tender.title: (Lot 6 - Housing with Care for Adults) Supported Accommodation - Hyndelle Lodge
tender.description: The Housing with Care provider will deliver a transformed model of ethical, asset based care and support, meeting the needs and aspirations of individuals to live fulfilled lives in their own home avoiding inappropriate admissions to hospital and residential care. The care and support will be delivered by skilled and compassionate workers, employed by a provider who offers excellent services based on responsible and supportive employment practice.

tender.title: Gentoo Group - New Build (Affordable Housing): Avenue Vivian
tender.description:
Gentoo Group Ltd has a requirement for the construction of 44 residential units for affordable rent with associated infrastructure and landscaping on land on Avenue Vivian/Rose Avenue, Fence-houses, Sunderland.

Prosper Procurement Ltd ("PROSPER") is managing this procurement on behalf of the Contracting Body.

PLEASE NOTE: This is an award notice following a Call for Competition under a Dynamic Purchasing System and this contract has been let.



Additional information: 
This is an award notice following a call for competition under
Dynamic Purchasing System Ref DN387749 - DPS for Construction and Development Works [OJEU Ref 2019/S 028-061447]

tender.title: Housing Related Support for Homeless Families
tender.description: The service will provide housing related support to homeless families in the city. The model of support will provide accommodation based provision and follow on resettlement support where appropriate for vulnerable couples with children, expectant mothers and male and female lone parents who are homeless. The service will be outcomes focused and support will be geared towards readiness for work and /or training and education and preparation for independent living.
